[00:00.00]﻿感敏怪
[00:01.76]作词：安扬
[00:03.52]作曲：安扬
[00:05.28]演唱：安扬+菲菲公主（陆绮菲）
[00:07.05]编曲：丁汗青
[00:08.81]混音：孙铭旭

[00:14.10]【未经著作权人许可不得翻唱翻录或使用】
[00:15.87]她随口一句哦
[00:17.49]我就丧气低着头
[00:19.26]习惯自找理由
[00:20.85]逐字逐帧慢镜头
[00:22.74]望向我的眼眸
[00:24.33]又让我深思许久
[00:26.16]好与坏都保留在
[00:27.87]心底的热气球
[00:30.36]幸福和痛苦我双倍感受
[00:33.87]也想多一些钝感力解救
[00:39.87]Just wanna feeling now 
[00:41.40]放下戒备心依靠
[00:44.19]我不想再做回敏感小孩
[00:47.61]多想大方炙烈勇敢表态
[00:51.00]情绪总 又隐没 又浮现
[00:53.40]又忽近 又忽远
[00:55.11]偏要内耗着沦陷
[00:57.90]我常常为了自尊试探爱
[01:01.23]心里的小题大做在作怪
[01:04.71]感敏总又忽近 又忽远
[01:07.35]又隐没 又浮现
[01:08.70]对自我保护的依赖
[01:10.95]也想被温柔地对待
[01:12.66]总羡慕别人能被爱
[01:14.25]可当Miss right 降临在我面前
[01:15.72]却又把所有感情都推开
[01:17.76]习惯反复证明 一段关系里我 是否是重要的
[01:21.27]害怕那些热情  脆弱的安全感 搞得我快要疯掉了
[01:25.02]常常克制着心 不敢靠太近
[01:28.47]或许倾听共情 才是我个性
[01:31.62]是天赋也是陷阱 我习惯了离开
[01:35.19]一个人渐远渐行 多自洽的悲哀
[01:39.03]我不想再做回敏感小孩
[01:42.48]多想大方炙烈勇敢表态

[02:02.22]又隐没 又浮现

[00:00.00]﻿在你离开的季节
[00:01.28]作词Lyrics：陈板正
[00:02.56]作曲Composed：陈板正
[00:03.85]演唱Vocal：菲菲公主（陆绮菲）
[00:05.13]编曲Arranger：STAR 
[00:06.42]吉他Guitar：周成
[00:07.70]混音Mixing Engineer：孙铭旭
[00:08.98]和声Background Vocalist：绾绾w 
[00:10.27]制作人Producer：陈板正
[00:11.55]OP：花火音乐
[00:12.84]【未经著作权人许可不得翻唱翻录或使用】
[00:14.13]叽叽喳喳 树上麻雀在聊啥
[00:20.13]天气又渐冷了
[00:26.13]忽远忽近我们关系好复杂
[00:30.45]手牵着吧 不用再害怕
[00:38.13]我们都默契地任凭泪落下
[00:44.01]下一站 你去哪儿
[00:50.16]逼仄的空间里 我们都没说话
[00:55.80]这是最后一次 送你回家
[01:00.27]我不要离别 不要思念陪伴我整夜
[01:06.27]我不要时间 来缓释我对你的一切
[01:12.30]痛苦像利剑 散落你离开每个季节
[01:18.30]我怎么忘却 我和你的起点

list.songName: 山楂树之恋 (英文版Love once in my life)
list.lrcContent:
[00:01.03]山楂树之恋（英文版Love once in my life）-菲菲公主（陆绮菲）
[00:02.36]词：大能人
[00:03.76]曲：大能人
[00:05.23]英文填词：虞绮
[00:06.74]编曲：卡其漠罗洋
[00:08.32]吉他：大牛
[00:09.96]和声：Ciyo
[00:11.43]人声编辑：梨酣
[00:13.11]混音：王巍MOKA
[00:14.65]制作人：卡其漠罗洋
[00:16.09]企划：刘灿
[00:17.62]出品：吉星电台
[00:19.20]【本音乐作品已获得正版授权】
[00:25.13]Oh my love for the first time
[00:27.96]Only u can be my Mr.Right
[00:30.98]For u I can drop the baseline
[00:34.09]How can I get u out of my sight
[00:37.21]You're the love once in my life
[00:40.22]Wanna forever by your side
[00:43.28]Promise u I'll never change my mind
[00:45.14]Share with u the whole time
[00:46.71]Like the dancing butterfly
[00:49.92]Regret the day we met was late to come
[00:52.46]Whether the distance between us is short or long
[00:55.30]Whenever being with you I wanna slow the time down
[00:58.51]Wanna have a kid with u wanna keep u around
[01:01.96]The world's always changing
[01:03.48]People always moving
[01:05.05]I don't mind in the past how your life was going
[01:07.90]To erase your fearing
[01:09.35]Make you have girly feelings
[01:11.16]My super motivation is for you struggling
[01:14.00]My sincerity of loving u is a clear lake
[01:16.98]Even swollen eyes can't overshadow your beautiful face
[01:19.96]Ten years later you'll be sleeping besides me I pray
[01:22.91]I'll pay whatever to relieve your fatigue every day
[01:26.05]Expect from u all the time so that pass my days so hard
[01:29.11]Care so much about how the aspects of your life are
[01:32.27]I feel like recharging every time you speak from heart
[01:35.24]I have to find space to stay at when you have no time for us
[01:38.62]Oh my love for the first time
[01:41.36]Only u can be my Mr.Right
[01:44.42]For u I can drop the baseline
[01:47.50]How can I get u out of my sight
[01:50.65]You're the love once in my life
[01:53.63]Wanna forever by your side
[01:56.67]Promise u I'll never change my mind
[01:58.52]Share with u the whole time
[02:00.06]Like the dancing butterfly
[02:02.81]Whether your habit or favor
[02:04.35]Your favorite food I remember
[02:05.82]I can't do for you to be colder
[02:07.36]But I can do it better
[02:08.86]I'll never fall asleep while you're not
[02:11.96]Even if tomorrow we together be in a muss
[02:15.08]I will do what I like
[02:16.55]And shut it out of mind
[02:18.02]Walk with you on the way to your home all day all night
[02:21.13]Can't fall in the sea of love
[02:22.68]Just for the half of part
[02:24.21]Use energy too much
[02:25.31]Cause we're bond to be what we are
[02:27.80]You're a bird in the sky
[02:29.16]To my treetop you fly
[02:30.57]From that day on my boring life has come to life
[02:34.16]I am sure that you do stay for me
[02:37.10]No matter how time flys I know you won't leave
[02:39.81]Think of something
[02:41.38]Dream of something
[02:42.92]Love u so much but you know nothing
[02:46.37]Would u wait for me
[02:47.81]Would u stay for me
[02:49.38]To stand with me under Hawthorn tree
[02:51.96]Oh my love for the first time
[02:54.75]Only u can be my Mr.Right
[02:57.83]For u I can drop the baseline
[03:00.88]How can I get u out of my sight
[03:04.06]You're the love once in my life
[03:06.94]Wanna forever by your side
[03:10.08]Promise u I'll never change my mind
[03:11.88]Share with u the whole time
[03:13.42]Like the dancing butterfly
